Career2Day Blog

Read practical career articles about roadmaps, CVs, interviews, portfolio projects, ATS keywords, and first-role preparation.

How to Follow a Career Roadmap Without Getting Overwhelmed

A practical way to move from beginner learning to portfolio proof without collecting endless courses.

CV Mistakes That Stop Good Candidates Getting Interviews

The most common resume problems are usually clarity problems, not talent problems.

How to Practice Interview Questions So Your Answers Sound Real

Interview preparation works best when you connect answers to projects, tradeoffs, and mistakes.

How to Become an AI Engineer With a Job-Ready Portfolio

AI engineering is not only model training. Employers want evaluated workflows, APIs, and product judgment.

Frontend Engineer Roadmap: From HTML to Production UI

A professional frontend path covers accessibility, state, APIs, performance, and product polish.

Why Quizzes Improve Career Readiness When Used Correctly

Quizzes are not just scoring tools. They reveal gaps and guide the next learning action.

Portfolio Projects That Make a CV Stronger

The best portfolio projects create CV bullets, interview stories, and proof of practical judgment.

ATS Keywords Without Making Your CV Sound Robotic

ATS optimization works best when keywords are placed inside honest, evidence-based statements.

What Job-Ready Really Means for Beginners

Job-ready does not mean expert. It means you can do useful junior work and explain your decisions.

How to Prepare for Your First 90 Days in a Tech Role

Getting hired is the start. The first 90 days are about trust, learning, and useful contribution.
